state.title: Desktop/eye project/docker/docker-compose.yml

metadata.preview:
version: '3.8'

services:
  # PostgreSQL Database
  postgres:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    container_name: eye_disease_db
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: eyedisease
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres123
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./scripts/init_db.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init_db.sql
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    networks:
      - eye_disease_network
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
